name: Test Suites
prompt:
You have 4 independent Python modules, each with bugs causing test failures:

1. network_monitor/ — network interface monitoring utilities (some tests failing)
2. cache_manager/ — LRU cache implementation (some tests failing)
3. report_generator/ — report formatting and statistics (some tests failing)
4. api_gateway/ — rate limiting and request routing (some tests failing)

For each module, debug and fix the bugs so all tests pass. Do not modify test files.

Run tests with: cd <module_dir> && python3 -m pytest tests/ -v

criteria.description: network_monitor pytest suite fully passes and its tests/ directory is intact
cache_manager pytest suite fully passes and its tests/ directory is intact
report_generator pytest suite fully passes and its tests/ directory is intact
api_gateway pytest suite fully passes and its tests/ directory is intact

origin.notes: imported from SkillOS paper E4 parallelism experiment
